message:
docs: rename tool events to tool_execution_*, document extension UI protocol, add SDK cookbook

The upstream TypeScript Pi agent renamed tool lifecycle events from
tool_start/tool_update/tool_end to tool_execution_start/tool_execution_update/
tool_execution_end and added a new tool_execution_update streaming event.
This commit updates all documentation to reflect that change:

- docs/rpc.md: Updated event names in the Events section, added
  extension_ui_response command documentation (requestId/id alias,
  confirmed/value/cancelled fields), added extension_ui_request and
  extension_error event entries
- docs/dropin-112-feature-inventory-matrix.md: Corrected event names in the
  SDK events table, closed parity gaps for auto_compaction_start/end and
  auto_retry_start/end (both now implemented in Rust), updated extension UI
  surface to show extension_ui_request/response and extension_error as
  verified with concrete test coverage references
- docs/dropin-parity-gap-ledger.json: Updated gap-extension-ui-parity entry
  with deterministic test evidence (e2e_rpc.rs roundtrips, json_mode_parity.rs
  schema assertions, upstream TS type contract), cleared blocked_by since
  the blocking issues are now resolved
- docs/sdk.md: New SDK cookbook and migration guide for teams embedding Pi as
  a Rust library, covering the TypeScript-to-Rust API surface mapping,
  in-process session creation, subscriber/hook patterns, RPC transport client
  usage, abort handle lifecycle, and model/thinking-level mutation recipes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -78,14 +78,23 @@ Communication is via **JSON Lines** over stdin/stdout. Each line must be a valid
 - **set_steering_mode**: "one-at-a-time" or "all".
 - **set_follow_up_mode**: "one-at-a-time" or "all".
 
+### Extension UI
+- **extension_ui_response**: Reply to a pending extension UI request.
+  - Params: `requestId` (preferred) or legacy alias `id`, plus one of:
+    - `confirmed` (boolean) for `confirm`
+    - `value` (string/boolean depending on method) for `select`/`input`/`editor`
+    - `cancelled` (`true`) to cancel
+
 ## Events
 
 - `agent_start`: Agent started working.
 - `text_delta`: Assistant text output chunk.
 - `thinking_delta`: Assistant thinking output chunk.
-- `tool_start`: Tool execution started.
-- `tool_update`: Streaming tool output.
-- `tool_end`: Tool execution finished.
+- `tool_execution_start`: Tool execution started.
+- `tool_execution_update`: Streaming tool output.
+- `tool_execution_end`: Tool execution finished.
+- `extension_ui_request`: Extension requested host UI interaction (confirm/select/input/editor/notify/etc.).
 - `agent_end`: Turn complete.
 - `auto_retry_start` / `auto_retry_end`: Transient error retries.
-- `auto_compaction_start` / `auto_compaction_end`: Auto-compaction status.
\ No newline at end of file
+- `auto_compaction_start` / `auto_compaction_end`: Auto-compaction status.
+- `extension_error`: Extension event dispatch/runtime error.
